title: Frosted Effect Christmas Bauble Light - Warm White Lights - 10cm Light Up Bauble With Micro LEDs - Battery Operated Ball Light - Indoor Christmas Decoration.
features: MAGICAL GLOW - Add a soft, magical glow to your home decor with this elegant Micro LED Frosted Ball Light. This charming light sphere combines simplicity with sophistication, featuring 10 warm white micro LEDs delicately encased within a frosted glass-effect ball for a beautifully diffused, ambient illumination.

FROSTED FINISH - The frosted finish softens the light, creating a gentle radiance that brings warmth and atmosphere to any space. Perfect for hanging in windows, displaying on shelves, or incorporating into festive arrangements, it adds a subtle touch of sparkle that complements both modern and traditional interiors.

10CM BALL - At 10cm in diameter, this ball is versatile enough for shelves, windows, or table settings, while also complementing larger lighting pieces in grouped arrangements. Small enough to tuck into shelves, hang from garlands, or group in decorative bowls, yet large enough to make a visible statement on its own. One ball supplied.

BATTERY OPERATED - With its battery-operated design and 1-metre flexible silver cable, this light is effortless to position and display, no plug or mains power required. The integrated hanging loop makes it easy to suspend from hooks, branches, or garlands, allowing you to brighten any corner of your home with ease.
Listing is for one frosted ball light only. Image for illustration purposes only.
